prepared_text:
May 25, 2020 
         
 
 
 
 
             IGAL/SECT/05-20/06 
To                                                                            
National Stock Exchange of India Limited 
Exchange Plaza, C - 1, Block G 
Bandra Kurla Complex 
Bandra - (E) 
Mumbai - 400 051 
 
Symbol: INDIGO 
To                                                       
Department of Corporate Services 
BSE Limited 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers 
Dalal Street 
Mumbai - 400 001 
 
Scrip Code: 539448 
  
Dear Sir, 
 
Sub : Intimation for Board Meeting and Earnings Call under Regulation 29 and 30 of the 
SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015  
In compliance with Regulation 29 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing 
Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and other applicable 
provisions, we would like to inform you that a meeting of the Board of Directors of 
InterGlobe Aviation Limited (the “Company”) is scheduled to be held on Tuesday, June 02, 
2020 through Audio-Visual means as per notification issued by Ministry of Corporate 
Affairs dated March 19, 2020. The said meeting, inter-alia, would consider the following: 
 
1. Approval of Audited standalone financial results of the Company for the quarter and 
year ended March 31, 2020; and 
 
2. Approval of Audited consolidated financial results of the Company for the quarter and 
year ended March 31, 2020. 
 
In compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 read with 
the InterGlobe Aviation Limited - Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report 
Trading by Designated Persons, we hereby inform you that the trading window for trading 
in securities of the Company by the Designated Persons was closed with effect from March 
24, 2020.  In the absence of unusual developments, the trading window will reopen 48 
hours after the announcement of financial results by the Company. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
    L62100DL2004PLC129768 
 
 

 
 
 
Further, in compliance with Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations, the schedule of 
earnings call in relation thereto is enclosed. 
 
This is for your information and record. 
 
Thanking you, 
For InterGlobe Aviation Limited 
 
 
 
Sanjay Gupta  
Company Secretary and Chief Compliance Officer 
 
SANJAY 
KUMAR 
GUPTA
Digitally signed by SANJAY 
KUMAR GUPTA

InterGlobe Aviation Limited (“IndiGo”) to Announce Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2020 Results 
on June 2, 2020 
Gurgaon, May 25, 2020: IndiGo will be announcing its Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2020 results 
on June 2, 2020. 
The company will conduct a 60 minutes conference call at 17:00 hours IST on June 2, 2020 (open 
to investors/ analysts in all regions), where senior management will discuss the company’s
qa_section:
performance and answer questions from participants. To participate in the conference call, please 
dial the numbers provided below. 
Results will be available around 16:00 hours on Tuesday, June 2, 2020 at the company’s website 
(www.goindigo.in) or on the exchange website (www.nseindia.com/ www.bseindia.com). 
The call will also be recorded and will be archived at www.goindigo.in. In addition, a transcript of 
the conference call will be available on www.goindigo.in 
Date and Time 
June 2, 2020 at: 
17:00 hours IST 
19:30 hours HKT 
11:30 hours UTC 
07:30 hours ET 
Hate to Wait? Pre-register at the following URL and get your unique dial-in details for the 
call
